name: Government Document Intake for Grant
description: Government Document Intake for Grant routes applications and scores inspections; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via Payment System to increase transparency.

steps.name: Request Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize sensors from Payment System; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: API Discovery
steps.description: Execute api discovery phase for the Tool-Use pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Tool Execution
steps.description: Execute tool execution phase for the Tool-Use pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Intake
steps.description: Intake across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Field Inspection
steps.description: Field Inspection across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Eligibility Determination
steps.description: Eligibility Determination across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Scheduling
steps.description: Scheduling across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Background Check
steps.description: Background Check across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Decision Support
steps.description: Decision Support across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Citizen Notification
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to GIS; return response JSON for the client.
